case_title: RUSLAN ABDIKEEV ET AL VS. TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABDIKEEV, RUSLAN AS TO DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **DENIED** UNTIMELY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $250.00 - SERVED DEC-30-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABDIKEEV, RUSLAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES $1,203.00 PRINCIPAL, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,503.00, COSTS REDUCED DUE TO EXCESSIVE SERVICE FEES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JACKY LOPEZ, CORPORATE LEGAL MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ABDIKEEV, RUSLAN ABDIKEEVA, TATIANA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-21-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABDIKEEV, RUSLAN

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,072.29 (SC-100 STAMPED: BY FAX) FILED BY ABDIKEEV, RUSLAN ABDIKEEVA, TATIANA AS TO DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-21-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT'S CLAIM BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF APR-21-2021 AT 3:30 PM. PLAINTIFF RUSLAN ABDIVEEK IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. PLAINTIFF'S ZOOM APPEARANCE IS ALLOWED BY COURT. DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, REPRESENTED BY JACKIE LOPEZ, CORPORATE LEGAL MANAGER IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED APR-06-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ABDIKEEV, RUSLAN ABDIKEEVA, TATIANA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-21-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR, DEFENDANT'S CLAIM DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABDIKEEV, RUSLAN AS TO DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES
